**Water frontier-orbital gap** — DFT, tier `standard` (B3LYP/def2-TZVP, no density fitting) in PySCF, gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1.
Geometry: user-supplied `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/water/water.xyz`, single-point calculation (no geometry optimization).
SCF converged in 7 cycles. No warnings reported.
HOMO = −8.6037183 eV, LUMO = +0.33695037 eV → HOMO–LUMO gap = 8.9406687 eV.
Command: `/home/erobles/chem-skills/mcp_server/chemkit_engine/cli.py frontier /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/water/water.xyz --method dft --tier standard --charge 0 --mult 1 --accept-defaults --out /home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmptuij4mev/live.json`.
Live log is streaming to `frontier_<timestamp>.out` in the working directory. The result JSON was written to `/home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmptuij4mev/live.json`. The engine integrity check passed (trustworthy = true).
